'''Myl Vlahu''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who fought in the [[Ruusan campaign]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. She was the sister of [[Zor Vlahu]] and died in an assault on the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].<ref name="jvs" /> The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Myl Vlahu (planet)|Myl Vlahu]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]] was named after her.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 1]] {{1stm}}
